user.title: BFE Rückliefertarif — choose utility
user.description:
## 2026 Swiss feed-in tariffs overview

| Utility | Base price | HKN payment (opt-in) | Billing |
|---|---|---|---|
| EKZ | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| BKW | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh (naturemade star) | Quarterly |
| CKW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| Groupe E | Reference market price | up to 4.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| Romande Energie | Reference market price | 0.00 (1.50 only Q1 2026) | Quarterly |
| SAK | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| SGSW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| ewz | Fixed price 12.91 Rp/kWh | included in base price | Quarterly |
| IWB | Fixed price 14.00 Rp/kWh | included in base price | Quarterly |
| SIG | Fixed price 10.96 Rp/kWh (at cap) | 0.00 | Quarterly |
| AEW | Fixed price 8.20 Rp/kWh (HKN included) | 0.00 | Quarterly |
| Other / Custom | — | — | — |

Your selection pre-fills the next step — every value remains editable.

tariff.title: Tariff configuration ({utility_name})
tariff.description:
Configure how your utility calculates feed-in compensation. Every value comes pre-filled from the utility you picked — adjust as needed.

### Plant category — legal floor & cap

The table below is fixed by Swiss law (EnV Art. 12 / StromVV Art. 4). The integration applies these automatically based on the *Plant category* you pick.

| Category | Min (Rp/kWh) | Max (Rp/kWh) |
|---|---|---|
| ≤30 kW with self-consumption | 6.00 | 10.96 |
| ≤30 kW feed-in only | 6.00 | 8.20 |
| 30–<100 kW with self-consumption | 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) | 10.96 |
| 30–<100 kW feed-in only | 6.20 | 8.20 |
| 100–<150 kW with self-consumption | 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) | 7.20 |
| 100–<150 kW feed-in only | 6.20 | 5.40 |
| ≥150 kW with self-consumption | — | 7.20 |
| ≥150 kW feed-in only | — | 5.40 |

### HKN payment

Opt-in at most utilities — set to **0.0** if you don't sell HKN. If base + HKN exceeds the compensation cap, the utility reduces HKN automatically.

data_description.anlagenkategorie: Determines floor + cap automatically. See the table above.
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw: Only required for 30–<150 kW with self-consumption (formula 180 ÷ kW). Leave at 0 otherwise.
data_description.basisverguetung: Reference market price for most utilities; fixed price for ewz / IWB / SIG / AEW.
data_description.hkn_verguetung_rp_kwh: 0.0 if you don't sell HKN. Up to 3.00 Rp/kWh at EKZ after myEKZ opt-in.
data_description.fixpreis_rp_kwh: Only used with 'Fixed price' base. 2026: ewz 12.91, IWB 14.00, SIG 10.96, AEW 8.20.
data_description.abrechnungs_rhythmus: Match your utility's invoice cycle. Most Swiss utilities settle quarterly.

entities.title: Home Assistant entity wiring
entities.description: Link the kWh counter for your grid export and the CHF sensor that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh: The **kWh counter** that tracks energy fed into the grid. Must already be wired into the **Energy Dashboard** under *'Return to grid'*.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf:
The **CHF sensor** that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates when you configure *'Return to grid with a price'* (usually named `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`).

This integration writes into its **Long-Term Statistics**.
data_description.namenspraefix:
Prefix for this integration's **diagnostic sensors** and **action buttons** (e.g. `sensor.PREFIX_basisverguetung`, `button.PREFIX_recompute_aktuelles_quartal`).

*Only change* if the default collides.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption — federal law uses the formula 180 ÷ kW to set the minimum compensation.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.

init.title: BFE Rückliefertarif options
init.description: What would you like to do?

tariff.title: Adjust tariff settings
tariff.description:
Edit your tariff configuration. The values you change here apply to every future re-import.

### Plant category — legal floor & cap

Fixed by Swiss law (EnV Art. 12 / StromVV Art. 4) and applied automatically based on the *Plant category*.

| Category | Min (Rp/kWh) | Max (Rp/kWh) |
|---|---|---|
| ≤30 kW with self-consumption | 6.00 | 10.96 |
| ≤30 kW feed-in only | 6.00 | 8.20 |
| 30–<100 kW with self-consumption | 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) | 10.96 |
| 30–<100 kW feed-in only | 6.20 | 8.20 |
| 100–<150 kW with self-consumption | 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) | 7.20 |
| 100–<150 kW feed-in only | 6.20 | 5.40 |
| ≥150 kW with self-consumption | — | 7.20 |
| ≥150 kW feed-in only | — | 5.40 |

data_description.anlagenkategorie: Determines floor + cap automatically. See the table above.
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw: Only required for 30–<150 kW with self-consumption (formula 180 ÷ kW).
data_description.basisverguetung: Reference market price for most utilities; fixed price for ewz / IWB / SIG / AEW.
data_description.hkn_verguetung_rp_kwh: 0.0 if you don't sell HKN. Up to 3.00 Rp/kWh at EKZ after myEKZ opt-in.

reimport_quarter.title: Re-import a specific quarter
reimport_quarter.description:
Recompute Rückliefervergütung CHF/h for a specific past quarter. Use this after fixing tariff settings to update an already-published quarter (e.g. correct a wrong HKN setting that was used for `2026Q1`).

**Format:** `YYYYQN`. Example: `2026Q1`, `2025Q4`.

The quarter must already be published by BFE — typically about 2 weeks after quarter end.

entities.title: Re-wire Home Assistant entities
entities.description: Change which Home Assistant entities this integration writes to. Use only if your sensor names changed.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh: kWh counter wired into the Energy Dashboard under 'Return to grid'.
data_description.namenspraefix: Prefix used to name this integration's diagnostic sensors and buttons.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.
